records.subject: Announcing the Acquisition of Right-of-Use Assets for Leasing on Behalf of Subsidiary, QMN (Amend leasing transaction unit amount)
records.fund_name:

Lot XX, North District, Taichung City):

 Right-of-use assets for leasing factory building
 located at Freemont, CA, USA
records.commitment_amount_raw:

unit price, and total transaction price:
 Leasing factory building of 178,910 square feet

 Leasing period is for 120 months

 IFRS16 calculation for right-of-use assets)
 Total contract amount is US$45,602,000 or approximately NT$1,336,133,000
